title: Error Taxonomy, Wrapping, Retry Decisions, User Recovery, and Exit · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Wrap Match
summary: Every failure becomes unable to fetch, handlers log and return nil, retries include invalid input, wrapped causes are discarded, and one command failure terminates the session. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go wrap match increment in causal recoverable Pokedex error contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit the…
